subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that thou hast arrived in health and safety, illumined by the radiance of Divine love. In truth, the eye of the spirit is gladdened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بصحت و سلامتی بانوار محبت الهی تشریف آوردید فی الحقیقه چشم جان روشن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
